calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Continued To May-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Russell Leibson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pantec Group, Inc., dba Exclusively Doors.
Miriam Athias, CFO for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Thompson Pacific Construction, Inc., a California corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on March 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 23, 2010.

Exhibit 1---Invoice from plaintiff to defendant dated 3/24/08------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Invoice from plaintiff to defendant dated 4/21/08------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Pantec Group, Inc., dba Exclusively Doors, and against the Defaulted Defendant Thompson Pacific Construction, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $117,440.94.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,694.04.
Costs - $526.52, for a total judgment in the amount of $138,661.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Continued To Apr-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
